# Email Verification Implementation TODO

Current Progress: 3/7 ✅

## Steps from Approved Plan:

1. ✅ **Create TODO.md** - Tracking file created
2. ✅ **Update backend/models/User.js** - Add otp and otpExpiry fields
3. ✅ **Add sendOTPEmail function to backend/services/emailService.js** - New email template/function for OTP
4. ✅ **Update backend/controllers/authController.js** - 
   - Rewrite register() for OTP flow
   - Add verifyEmailOTP() function
   - Update login() to require isVerified
5. **Update backend/routes/auth.js** - Add POST /verify-email route
6. **Test backend endpoints** - Manual testing via Postman/curl
7. **attempt_completion** - Mark task complete

## Testing Commands:
```bash
# Start server (if not running)
npm start

# Test register (check console for OTP logs)
curl -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"name\":\"Test\",\"email\":\"test@example.com\",\"password\":\"123456\"}"

# Test verify (use OTP from console/email)
curl -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/verify-email -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"email\":\"test@example.com\",\"otp\":\"123456\"}"

# Test login (should fail before verify, succeed after)
curl -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"email\":\"test@example.com\",\"password\":\"123456\"}"
```

Next: Update auth routes 👇
